channel.title: Homelab on Yuliia Kostrikova
channel.description: Recent content in Homelab on Yuliia Kostrikova

item.title: HowTo: Fix iSCSI mounts after reboot
item.description: a follow-up to my previous article on PXE/iSCSI setup, addressing the annoying issue of iSCSI auto-mounting failure

item.title: k8s cluster on Raspberry PI's with iSCSI block storage
item.description: exploring the challenges of running a k8s cluster on Raspberry PI's with PXE network boot and overcoming containerd storage limitations using iSCSI

item.title: Detailed HowTo: PXE boot multiple RPi (Birthday Edition 🍰)
item.description: PXE (Preboot eXecution Environment) is a client-server environment which makes possible to boot and install operating systems without the need of physical media.

item.title: Setting Up a DHCP Server on Synology NAS in a UniFi Dream Machine SE Subnet
item.description:
In this blog post, I’ll guide you through the process of setting up a DHCP server on your Synology NAS within a subnet created on a UniFi Dream Machine Special Edition (UDM SE).

Prerequisites

Before we start, ensure you have the following:

  1. UDM SE: UniFi Dream Machine Special Edition.
  2. Synology NAS: Network Attached Storage device from Synology.
  3. Raspberry Pi: Any model will suffice.
  4. Ethernet cables: To connect your devices.

Step-by-Step Guide

1. Create a Subnet on UDM SE

  1. Log in to your UniFi Router: Access your UDM SE via the UniFi Network application.

item.title: RPI 5 on Ubuntu 24.04 (Headless): Connect to WiFi / Mobile Hotspot
item.description:
RPI 5 on Ubuntu 24.04 (headless): Connect to WiFi / Mobile Hotspot

Introduction

In my free time, I enjoy tinkering with my home lab, exploring new projects and challenges. Recently, I decided to connect my Raspberry Pi 5 to a mobile hotspot—a seemingly straightforward task. However, it turned out not so smooth. In this post, I’ll walk you through how I resolved the error brcmfmac: brcmf_set_channel: set chanspec fail, reason -52 and successfully connected Raspberry Pi to a mobile hotspot.
